problem id: d75b53c7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) XOR SHL(1)

examples:
  01011101 -> 01101111
  10010000 -> 00101001
  00000011 -> 00110110
  11110111 -> 10010001
  00110111 -> 00011101
  11010110 -> 11000001
  01011111 -> 01001011
  01111010 -> 01010011

query: 10001100
predicted answer: 11010000
